title: Project Miner Local Field Kickoff Prep Brief Export
objective: Reduce PM-to-lead and PM-to-field relay burden by adding a browser-local field kickoff prep Markdown export to the Project Miner intake workbench, derived from current read-only intake context and local review state, while preserving that it is context only and not work authorization.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Field-Prep Implementer
implemented_scope: Add an Export Field Kickoff Brief action to /pm-review/import-intake.
Generate a Markdown field-prep brief from the already-loaded intake packet, local review checklist, local approval-decision draft, local PM operating queue, and local executor closeout intake.
Include explicit no-authority and no-work-authorization language in the field kickoff prep brief.
Add focused Playwright assertions for the field kickoff brief filename, content sections, no-authority wording, exact read seams, zero mutation calls, and no approve/persist/submit/import controls.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
brief_sections: Project Miner Field Kickoff Prep Brief
allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Use one read-only sidecar scout for field-prep export boundary and content review.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.
not_allowed: No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
validation_steps: rg -n "kickoff approved|released to field|ready for execution|authorized work|dispatch|production-ready|assigned|scheduled" apps/operations-web/app/pm-review/import-intake/page.tsx apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts

corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-candidate.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-admission-plan.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-approval-readiness.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
validation_results: operations-web production build passed with /pm-review/import-intake in the route output.
Prohibited release-to-field wording scan passed with no matches.
Focused import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed after refreshing the production build.
Focused PM intake Playwright smoke suite passed with 4 passed on serialized rerun after build.
Packet JSON parse passed with packet-json-ok.
git diff --check passed with line-ending normalization warnings only.
